Services.cta_desc: Let's discuss your needs and find the perfect solution together.
Services.hero_headline: Modern code, built for Moroccan businesses.
Services.faq1_q: How much does a website cost?
Services.faq1_a: Our prices start at 3,000 MAD for a simple showcase site. The cost varies based on complexity, features and design. Contact us for a free, personalized quote.
Services.faq2_q: How long does it take to build a website?
Services.faq2_a: A showcase website typically takes 2 to 3 weeks. An e-commerce store or complex application may require 4 to 8 weeks. We define the timeline together from the start.
Services.faq3_q: Will the site be responsive and mobile-optimized?
Services.faq3_a: Absolutely. All our sites are designed mobile-first and tested across all devices. Mobile optimization is included in every project.
Services.faq4_q: Do you offer maintenance after delivery?
Services.faq4_a: Yes, we offer monthly maintenance packages including updates, security, backups and responsive technical support.
Services.faq5_a: We use the most modern technologies: Next.js, React, Laravel, PHP, Tailwind CSS. The choice depends on the specific needs of your project.

ServiceDetail.cta_desc: Let's discuss your project and find the best solution.
ServiceDetail.web_tagline: Fast, beautiful sites that convert visitors into clients.
ServiceDetail.web_intro: We design and develop modern, responsive websites tailored to your brand. From single-page sites to complex multi-page platforms, every project is built with performance, SEO, and user experience in mind. Your site will look stunning on every device and load in under 2 seconds.
ServiceDetail.web_features_title: Everything you need for a professional online presence.
ServiceDetail.web_features: Fully responsive design for all devices, SEO optimization from day one, Content management system (CMS), Fast hosting with SSL included, Google Analytics integration, Contact forms and social media links
ServiceDetail.web_step1_desc: We analyze your brand, target audience, and competitors. Then we create wireframes and a site map to plan every page.
ServiceDetail.web_step2_desc: High-fidelity mockups in Figma. You see exactly how your site will look before we write a single line of code.
ServiceDetail.web_step3_desc: We build with Next.js and Tailwind CSS for blazing-fast performance. After testing on all devices, we deploy and hand over.
ServiceDetail.web_tools: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Figma, Vercel, WordPress
ServiceDetail.ecommerce_tagline: Online stores that sell around the clock.
ServiceDetail.ecommerce_intro: We build complete e-commerce platforms with secure payment processing, inventory management, and beautiful product showcases. Whether you're selling 10 products or 10,000, we create stores that convert visitors into buyers with a seamless checkout experience.
ServiceDetail.ecommerce_features_title: Everything to run a successful online store.
ServiceDetail.ecommerce_features: Secure payment gateway integration, Product catalog with filters and search, Real-time inventory management, Customer dashboard and order tracking, Multi-currency and shipping options, Mobile-optimized shopping experience
ServiceDetail.ecommerce_step1_desc: We map out your product catalog, payment flow, shipping options, and customer journey from landing to checkout.
ServiceDetail.ecommerce_step2_desc: Product pages, cart flow, and checkout designed for maximum conversions. Every click is intentional.
ServiceDetail.ecommerce_step3_desc: We integrate payment providers, set up inventory systems, and launch your store with full testing.
ServiceDetail.ecommerce_tools: Laravel, PHP, Stripe, WooCommerce, Next.js, MySQL
ServiceDetail.mobile_tagline: Apps your users will love to open every day.
ServiceDetail.mobile_intro: We create high-performance iOS and Android applications with smooth, intuitive user experiences. From concept to App Store, we handle design, development, and deployment. Our apps are built to scale and designed to keep users engaged.
ServiceDetail.mobile_features: iOS and Android from a single codebase, Polished UI/UX with smooth animations, Push notifications and real-time updates, Offline mode and data sync, App Store and Play Store submission, Analytics and crash reporting
ServiceDetail.mobile_step1_desc: We define user flows, create personas, and prototype the key screens. You test the app before we build it.
ServiceDetail.mobile_step2_desc: Pixel-perfect design followed by agile development with weekly builds you can install and test.
ServiceDetail.mobile_step3_desc: Thorough QA on real devices, performance optimization, then submission to the App Store and Play Store.
ServiceDetail.mobile_tools: React Native, Expo, TypeScript, Firebase, Figma
ServiceDetail.seo_tagline: Rank higher. Get found. Grow faster.
ServiceDetail.seo_intro: We boost your visibility on Google through technical SEO, content strategy, and performance optimization. Our data-driven approach ensures sustainable growth in organic traffic. We don't do shortcuts — we build a solid foundation that compounds over time.
ServiceDetail.seo_features_title: A complete SEO strategy, not just keywords.
ServiceDetail.seo_features: Full technical SEO audit, Keyword research and mapping, On-page optimization (meta tags and content), Site speed and Core Web Vitals optimization, Google Search Console and Analytics setup, Monthly reporting with actionable insights
ServiceDetail.seo_step1_desc: We analyze your current rankings, crawl your site for technical issues, and research the keywords your audience searches for.
ServiceDetail.seo_step2_desc: We fix technical issues, optimize page content, improve site speed, and structure your data for search engines.
ServiceDetail.seo_step3_desc: Monthly reports track your progress. We adjust strategy based on data and keep pushing your rankings higher.
ServiceDetail.seo_tools: Google Search Console, Google Analytics, Ahrefs, Lighthouse, Schema.org
ServiceDetail.maintenance_tagline: Sleep well. Your site is in good hands.
ServiceDetail.maintenance_intro: We offer monthly maintenance packages to keep your website updated, secure, and performing at its best. From software updates to security patches, backups, and technical support — we handle everything so you can focus on your business.
ServiceDetail.maintenance_features: Regular CMS and plugin updates, Security monitoring and patches, Automated daily backups, Performance monitoring and optimization, Priority technical support, Uptime monitoring with instant alerts
ServiceDetail.maintenance_step1_desc: We review your current setup, identify vulnerabilities, and create a maintenance plan tailored to your needs.
ServiceDetail.maintenance_step2_desc: Weekly updates, security scans, and backups run automatically. We fix issues before they become problems.
ServiceDetail.maintenance_step3_desc: Monthly reports show uptime, performance metrics, updates applied, and any issues resolved.

About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: A local agency, global expertise
About.story_p1: Based in the heart of Marrakech, Ibda3 Digital was born from a passion for digital and a belief: every business deserves an online presence that matches its ambition.
About.story_p2: We combine creativity, technical expertise and local market knowledge to deliver digital solutions that make a difference.
About.why1_desc: Based in Marrakech, we meet our clients in person to understand their needs.
About.why2_desc: Clean code, modern design and optimal performance — we don't compromise.
About.why3_desc: From design to launch and beyond, we're by your side every step of the way.
About.why4_desc: Rates adapted to the Moroccan market, without sacrificing quality.
About.why_tagline: An agency that lives in Marrakech, speaks your language and delivers clean code.
About.step1_desc: On-site workshop. We listen, define goals and set the project scope.
About.step2_desc: High-fidelity mockups, clickable prototype, mobile and desktop validation.
About.step3_desc: Short sprints, weekly demos. Version-controlled code, tests at every step.
About.step4_desc: Go live, training, monitoring. Ongoing support.

CaseStudy.cta_desc: Let's build something great together. Tell us about your vision and we'll bring it to life.
CaseStudy.goudoukh_tagline: A premium rental experience for Marrakech's finest vehicles.
CaseStudy.goudoukh_meta_desc: Case study: How we built a premium luxury car rental platform for Goudoukh in Marrakech with fleet showcase, booking system and concierge services.
CaseStudy.goudoukh_challenge: Goudoukh needed a digital platform that matched the luxury of their fleet. Their existing presence didn't convey the premium experience they offer and lacked a streamlined booking flow for high-end clients.
CaseStudy.goudoukh_solution: We designed and built a sleek, dark-themed platform that puts the vehicles center stage. A quick booking system with date selection and availability checking streamlines the rental process, while concierge service highlights build trust with luxury clientele.
CaseStudy.goudoukh_step1_desc: Researched the luxury car rental market in Marrakech and designed a premium visual identity with dark UI, bold typography and high-impact vehicle imagery.
CaseStudy.goudoukh_step2_desc: Built the platform with Next.js and React, implementing the fleet showcase, quick booking system with date pickers, and vehicle comparison tool.
CaseStudy.goudoukh_step3_desc: Deployed on Vercel with performance optimization, WhatsApp integration for instant inquiries, and responsive design for mobile bookings.
CaseStudy.goudoukh_features: Fleet showcase with specifications,Quick booking with date selection,Vehicle comparison tool,Concierge services section,WhatsApp integration,Multi-language support (EN/FR/AR)
CaseStudy.tannour_meta_desc: Case study: How we created a luxury e-commerce platform for Tannour, a Marrakech artisan leather brand with heritage storytelling and modern shopping experience.
CaseStudy.tannour_challenge: Tannour needed an e-commerce platform that would honor the heritage of Marrakech's leather artisans — dating back to the 14th century — while providing a modern, trustworthy shopping experience for international customers.
CaseStudy.tannour_solution: We crafted an elegant e-commerce store that blends heritage storytelling with modern UX. The design uses warm earth tones and refined typography to reflect the brand's artisan roots, while the shopping flow is smooth and conversion-optimized.
CaseStudy.tannour_step1_desc: Developed a visual identity rooted in Marrakech's leather heritage — warm earth tones, elegant serif typography, and geometric Moroccan motifs.
CaseStudy.tannour_step2_desc: Built the product catalog with category filtering, wishlist functionality, and a streamlined cart-to-checkout flow optimized for conversions.
CaseStudy.tannour_step3_desc: Created heritage storytelling content about the craft, optimized product photography, and launched with multi-language support.
CaseStudy.tannour_features: Product catalog with categories,Heritage brand storytelling,Wishlist functionality,Mobile-optimized shopping,Multi-language support,High-quality product photography
CaseStudy.terrene_meta_desc: Case study: How we built a premium portfolio website for Terrene Studio, an architecture and interior design studio with elegant project showcases.
CaseStudy.terrene_challenge: Terrene Studio needed a portfolio website that would let their architectural and interior design work speak for itself — fast-loading, elegant, and focused on visual impact without distractions.
CaseStudy.terrene_solution: We created a clean, image-focused portfolio that showcases projects through large-format photography and minimal UI. The design philosophy mirrors the studio's own approach: every element has purpose.
CaseStudy.terrene_step1_desc: Analyzed the studio's best projects and designed a layout where architecture imagery takes center stage with generous whitespace and refined typography.
CaseStudy.terrene_step2_desc: Built a fast, static website with semantic HTML, modern CSS and smooth JavaScript interactions for gallery navigation and transitions.
CaseStudy.terrene_step3_desc: Optimized images for web, added client testimonials, ensured full responsiveness, and deployed for production.
CaseStudy.terrene_features: Full-screen project galleries,Design philosophy section,Client testimonials,Responsive image-heavy layout,Fast static performance,Contact integration
CaseStudy.victory-path_meta_desc: Case study: How we built Victory Path, a bilingual achievement tracking web app with English/Arabic support, dark/light themes and PWA capabilities.
CaseStudy.victory-path_challenge: Victory Path needed a bilingual achievement tracking application that works seamlessly in both English and Arabic with full RTL support, theme switching, and the ability to work offline as a PWA.
CaseStudy.victory-path_solution: We built a fast, modern web application using React and Vite with complete bilingual support. The app detects user language preference and adapts the entire UI — layout direction, typography, and content — accordingly.
CaseStudy.victory-path_step1_desc: Designed the application architecture with internationalization as a first-class concern — RTL layout system, locale-aware routing, and translation management.
CaseStudy.victory-path_step2_desc: Built the achievement tracking dashboard with progress visualization, goal management, and a clean UI that adapts to dark and light themes.
CaseStudy.victory-path_step3_desc: Configured PWA capabilities for offline access, optimized bundle size with Vite, and tested across browsers and devices in both language modes.
CaseStudy.victory-path_features: Bilingual interface (EN/AR),Full RTL support,Dark/light theme toggle,Achievement tracking dashboard,Progress visualization,PWA with offline mode
